'''Hoddas Umgil''' was one of [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr's]] childhood friends and a youth of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Old Jedi Order]] who survived [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] issued by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Nichos remembered how they searched for [[Plett's Well]]. Umgil was one of the [[Children of the Jedi]], hidden on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]].

{{Char-stub}}
